missions.name: Cryo Seal Inspection
missions.description: A cryogenic store on a patient asteroid is throwing a slow boil-off warning. Spacewalk the tank array, find the seam, cold-patch it. The practice is in no hurry; the patient is in less.

missions.name: Suspension Cylinder Telemetry
missions.description: A patient-pig cylinder's telemetry has gone vague. EVA out to the bus, swap the reaction wheel stack, bring the readings back into spec. Treat the cylinder gently.

missions.name: Listening Ward — Mirror Phasing
missions.description: One of the deep-sky telescopes the practice maintains for our older patients drifted in a thermal shock. Read the wavefront sensor, walk the segments in by hand. Quiet job.

missions.name: Orbital Asset Servicing
missions.description: An on-orbit asset of ours is throwing faults across multiple subsystems. Diagnostics inconclusive. EVA out, find the broken parts, patch them in place.

missions.name: Baseline Interface Install
missions.description: A patient satellite needs a baseline-interface board seated in its housing — small board, neat connectors, the practice's logo on the underside. The diagnostics will tell them in the morning.
